title: UI text and style fixes: footer, selection label, section headings

requirements.text: Remove the footer tagline text 'Bringing you the finest handcrafted dim sum, made fresh daily with traditional recipes passed down through generations.' from the Footer component.

quotes: Remove footer "Bringing you the finest handcrafted dim sum, made fresh daily with traditional recipes passed down through generations."

acceptanceCriteria: The tagline text no longer appears in the footer.
The rest of the footer content (branding, address, phone, attribution) remains intact.

requirements.text: In the Menu component, change the Porsian selection counter label from '5/5 dipilih' to '5/5 selected' (and update the pattern so any x/5 count reads 'x/5 selected' in English).
acceptanceCriteria: The selection counter label displays 'selected' instead of 'dipilih'.
The counter correctly reflects the current number of selected ingredients (e.g., '3/5 selected', '5/5 selected').

requirements.text: Make the 'Place Your Order' section heading font size match the font size currently used by the 'Our Menu' section heading.

quotes: Make "Place Your Order" font size same as "Our Menu"

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Place Your Order' heading has the same font size as the 'Our Menu' heading.
No other heading styles are unintentionally altered.

requirements.text: Apply the font style (font family, weight, letter spacing, text transform, etc.) and border styling currently used on the 'Place Your Order' section heading to the 'Our Menu' section heading.

quotes: Make "Our Menu" font style and border same as "Place Your Order"

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Our Menu' heading visually matches the 'Place Your Order' heading in font style and any border/underline decorations.
Both headings now share a consistent typographic and decorative treatment.

constraints: Do not alter any immutable frontend paths (hooks, main.tsx, ui components).
Do not modify backend logic; this is a frontend-only change.
nonGoals: Redesigning the overall page layout or color theme.
Changing any other text content beyond what is specified.
